# viettelidc_ovpc_certificate (Data Source)

Look up an existing ViettelIDC TLS/SSL Certificate by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Certificate UUID. Either 'id' or 'name' must be provided.
- `name` (String) Certificate display name. Either 'id' or 'name' must be provided.
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID. Uses provider default if not specified.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp (ISO-8601).
- `status` (String) Current certificate status.
